what_works.public_site: Full site — nav, hero, services tabs, portfolio, process, reviews, lead form
what_works.chat_rag: Working — Vectorize + Llama-3.1-8b, 5 matches returned, correct answers from indexed content
what_works.estimate_flow: Working — init > project type > location > call/callback/upload state machine
what_works.callback_flow: Working in chat — name > phone > preferred time > saves to D1
what_works.leads: POST /leads saves to D1, returns lead_id
what_works.callbacks: POST /callback saves to D1, returns callback_id
what_works.upload: POST /upload sends to R2 under contractor-v003-2/uploads/
what_works.admin_status: Dashboard with D1/Vectorize/R2/AI status cards, leads/callbacks/articles counts
what_works.admin_leads: Table view of all leads from D1 via /api/admin/leads
what_works.admin_callbacks: Table view of callbacks from D1 via /api/admin/callbacks
what_works.admin_seed: Re-embed button triggers POST /api/seed, re-embeds all articles
what_works.admin_rag_tester: Search box queries /chat in qa state, shows vector matches with scores

what_is_missing.lead_source_tracking: lead_section column not in D1 schema yet — needs ALTER TABLE or schema migration
what_is_missing.admin_leads_crm: No status workflow (New/Contacted/Quoted/Won/Lost), no notes field, no CSV export
what_is_missing.media_library: No file upload UI in admin, no media grid, no R2 browser
what_is_missing.article_manager: No publish/draft toggle, no article editor, no hero image picker, no public article pages with HTML
what_is_missing.site_customizer: Phone, company name, colors all hardcoded — not in D1 site_config table
what_is_missing.email_notifications: notified flag not implemented, no Resend integration
what_is_missing.lead_form_budget_timeline: Lead form missing budget and timeline dropdowns vs roadmap spec
what_is_missing.callback_widget: No standalone callback widget on public page — only in chat flow
what_is_missing.analytics_dashboard: No lead source breakdown, no weekly lead counts

next_phase: Phase 3 — Admin Core hardening: lead source tracking, CRM status workflow, CSV export, media library, standalone callback widget on public page
